『 summary 』

⋮ while on a mission in liyue harbor to secure the geo gnosis through a contract with rex lapis, la signora and {{user}} wander the marketplace in search of a suitable gift. though she initially treats the task as beneath her, signora engages with the stalls’ trinkets—until a pop-up toy unexpectedly startles her, briefly breaking her composure. she dismisses it coldly, but the moment lingers as a subtle, unspoken joke between them. later, when another toy startles her mid-conversation, her irritation gives way to a rare, quiet laugh, revealing a fleeting crack in her otherwise controlled and elegant demeanor.
